name: ABB SACE S2N Molded Case Circuit Breaker 160A
description: The ABB SACE S2N is a molded case circuit breaker (MCCB) with 160A rated current and 36 kA breaking capacity at 415V. Electronic trip unit with adjustable LSI protection for industrial power distribution systems.
shortDescription: MCCB 160A, 3-pole, 36 kA, electronic trip, adjustable LSI protection.
technicalDescription: 3-pole molded case circuit breaker with solid-state electronic trip unit. Rated current 160A with adjustable long-time (L), short-time (S), and instantaneous (I) protection. Withdrawable version available.
features: Electronic trip unit with LSI protection curves
Adjustable current settings and time delays
Auxiliary contacts and alarm switches available
benefits: Precise protection coordination with adjustable settings
High breaking capacity handles fault currents reliably
Reduces arc flash energy with electronic trip characteristics
seoDescription: ABB SACE S2N molded case circuit breaker, 160A, 3-pole, 36 kA, electronic LSI trip. For main switchboards and motor control centers.

faq.question: What is the breaking capacity at 690V?
faq.answer: Breaking capacity at 690V AC is 18 kA. At 240V AC it is 65 kA.

faq.question: Can this breaker be used for DC circuits?
faq.answer: For DC applications, use ABB SACE DC-rated circuit breakers based on the same platform.

faq.question: What communication options are available?
faq.answer: Modbus RTU and Profibus DP communication modules are available for remote monitoring and control.

name: Schneider TeSys D-Series Contactor 65A, 110V Coil
description: The Schneider TeSys D LC1D65 is a 3-pole power contactor rated at 65A AC-3 duty for motor switching. With a 110V 50/60 Hz coil voltage, it provides reliable control of electric motors, lighting, and resistive loads.
shortDescription: 3-pole power contactor, 65A AC-3, 110V AC coil, motor switching.
technicalDescription: IEC 60947-4-1 compliant contactor with 3 main poles, 65A AC-3 utilization (30 kW at 400V). 110V 50/60 Hz coil with integrated surge suppressor. Mirror contact and screw-clamp terminals.
features: 110V AC 50/60 Hz coil with surge protection
benefits: Long electrical and mechanical life (1.5M cycles)
Compact design saves panel space
Simple DIN rail or screw mounting
seoTitle: Schneider TeSys D LC1D65 Contactor | 65A, 110V Coil
seoDescription: Schneider TeSys D LC1D65A 3-pole power contactor, 65A AC-3, 110V AC coil. For motor, pump, and lighting control in industrial applications.

faq.question: What is the AC-1 rating?
faq.answer: The AC-1 (resistive load) rating is 100A.

faq.question: Can this be used for reversing motor starters?
faq.answer: Yes, use two contactors with mechanical and electrical interlocking for reversing applications.

faq.question: What coil voltage options are available?
faq.answer: Available in 24V AC/DC, 48V, 110V, 230V, 400V, and 415V AC coil voltages.

name: Siemens 3TH42 Industrial Control Relay 4NO+4NC
description: The Siemens 3TH42 is an industrial control relay with 4 normally open (NO) and 4 normally closed (NC) contacts. With a 24V DC coil, this relay provides flexible logic control for industrial automation systems.
shortDescription: Industrial control relay, 4NO+4NC, 24VDC coil, screw terminals.
technicalDescription: Electromechanical control relay with 4 NO and 4 NC contacts rated at 6A/250V AC. 24V DC coil with LED indicator and protective diode. Screw terminal connections. Snap-on mounting for DIN rail.
features: 24V DC coil with LED and protective diode
benefits: Reduces panel wiring time with bridgeable terminals
Visual status indication with green LED
High contact density saves panel space
seoDescription: Siemens 3TH4280 industrial control relay with 4NO+4NC contacts, 24VDC coil, LED indicator. For PLC interfacing and control logic expansion.

faq.question: What is the minimum switching capacity?
faq.answer: Minimum reliable switching is 0.1A at 5V for gold-plated contacts. Standard contacts at 1A/12V.

faq.question: Can this relay be used for PLC output?
faq.answer: Yes, 24V DC coil makes it directly compatible with PLC digital outputs.

faq.question: What accessories are available?
faq.answer: Bridge plates, marking tags, and hold-down clips are available.

name: ABB Emax 2 Air Circuit Breaker 3200A
description: The ABB Emax 2 is a 3200A air circuit breaker (ACB) for low-voltage main distribution. With true RMS electronic trip unit, it provides comprehensive protection for generators, transformers, and large power distribution systems.
shortDescription: Air circuit breaker 3200A, 3-pole, withdrawable, electronic trip, 65 kA.
technicalDescription: 3-pole air circuit breaker rated at 3200A with Ekip Hi-Touch electronic trip unit. Withdrawable version with fully-removable chassis. 65 kA breaking capacity at 415V. Intelligent energy management with Ekip Com Hub.
features: 3200A rated current with 65 kA breaking capacity
Ekip Hi-Touch electronic trip unit with touchscreen
Energy management and power metering built-in
Ekip Com Hub for IoT connectivity
benefits: Built-in energy metering eliminates separate meters
Predictive maintenance with cloud connectivity
Reduced arc energy with fast trip times
seoDescription: ABB Emax 2 3200A air circuit breaker, 3-pole, withdrawable, Ekip Hi-Touch trip, 65 kA. For main LV distribution and generator protection.

faq.question: What is the height dimension?
faq.answer: Total height is 400mm for the fixed version, 420mm for the withdrawable version on chassis.

faq.question: What communication protocols are supported?
faq.answer: Modbus RTU/TCP, Profinet IO, EtherNet/IP, and OPC UA are supported via Ekip Com Hub modules.

faq.question: Is arc flash protection integrated?
faq.answer: Yes, the Ekip Hi-Touch trip unit includes arc flash reduction maintenance setting with fast trip.

name: Schneider Altistart 22 Soft Starter 32A
description: The Schneider Altistart 22 is a soft starter for three-phase induction motors. This 32A unit provides smooth acceleration and deceleration for pumps, fans, and conveyors, reducing mechanical stress and electrical inrush.
shortDescription: Soft starter 32A, 200-480V, 15 kW, internal bypass, 6-wire control.
technicalDescription: Soft starter with 32A rated current for 15 kW motor at 400V. Internal bypass contactors for energy savings. 6-wire (inside delta) and 3-wire connection support. Integrated overload protection and relay outputs.
features: Soft start and soft stop for reduced mechanical stress
Internal bypass contactors for zero heat dissipation
Configurable via front panel keypad or software
benefits: Eliminates water hammer in pump systems
Reduces belt wear in conveyor drives
Energy savings with built-in bypass contactors
seoDescription: Schneider ATS22D32Q soft starter, 32A, 15 kW, 200-480V, internal bypass. For pumps, fans, and conveyors in industrial applications.

faq.question: What is inside delta (6-wire) connection?
faq.answer: Inside delta connects the soft starter in series with each motor winding, allowing a lower current rating of the starter (58% of motor FLC).

faq.question: Do I need an external overload relay?
faq.answer: No, the Altistart 22 has integrated electronic overload protection.

faq.question: What is the bypass function?
faq.answer: Once the motor reaches full speed, internal contactors bypass the thyristors, eliminating heat dissipation and improving efficiency.

name: Siemens 4AM61 Control Power Transformer 630VA
description: The Siemens 4AM61 is a single-phase control power transformer for industrial control panels. Rated at 630VA with 480V primary to 120V secondary, it provides isolated power for PLCs, contactors, and instrumentation.
technicalDescription: Single-phase isolation transformer with 630VA rating. Copper windings with polyester resin impregnation. Steel enclosure with terminal block connection. Fuse holders on primary and secondary. Temperature rise 80°C.
benefits: Isolates control circuits from line power
Reduced voltage for safe control panel operation
Compact footprint saves panel space
seoDescription: Siemens 4AM61 single-phase control transformer, 630VA, 480V/120V, copper windings. For control panel power supply in industrial applications.

faq.question: What fuse sizes are required?
faq.answer: Primary fuse: 4A (time-delay). Secondary fuse: 8A (time-delay). Fuse holders included.

faq.question: Can this be used for DC power supplies?
faq.answer: No, this is an AC transformer. For DC, connect a rectifier module to the secondary.

faq.question: What is the efficiency?
faq.answer: Efficiency at full load is approximately 92% with copper windings.

name: Schneider / Nexans NYY Power Cable 4x16mm² (100m)
description: NYY heavy-duty PVC power cable with 4 copper conductors of 16mm² each for low-voltage power distribution in industrial and commercial installations. 100-meter drum for main feeders and sub-distribution.
shortDescription: Power cable NYY-J 4x16mm² Cu, 0.6/1kV, PVC, 100m drum.
technicalDescription: NYY-J power cable per VDE 0276-603 / IEC 60502-1. 4 copper conductors (4-core) of 16mm² each. PVC insulation and PVC outer sheath. 0.6/1kV rated voltage. Suitable for indoor, outdoor, and underground installations.
features: PVC insulation and PVC outer sheath
Suitable for indoor, outdoor, and direct burial
benefits: Universal cable for most industrial power applications
Flame retardant per IEC 60332-1
Durable PVC sheath resists mechanical damage
seoDescription: NYY-J PVC power cable 4x16mm² copper, 0.6/1kV, VDE certified. For industrial power distribution, switchboards, and motor supply on 100m drum.

faq.question: What is the bending radius?
faq.answer: Minimum bending radius is 15x cable diameter (340mm) for fixed installation.

faq.question: Can this be used outdoors?
faq.answer: Yes, the PVC sheath is UV-resistant and suitable for outdoor and direct burial installations.

faq.question: What is the maximum operating temperature?
faq.answer: Maximum conductor temperature is 70°C continuous, 90°C under fault conditions (short circuit).

name: ABB MNS 800 Motor Control Center Section (16 Drawers)
description: The ABB MNS 800 is a modular motor control center section with 16 pull-out drawers for starting and protecting motors up to 200 kW. The arc-resistant design provides enhanced safety for operators and equipment.
shortDescription: MCC section, 16-drawer, arc-resistant, 630A bus, for motors up to 200 kW.
technicalDescription: Modular motor control center section with 16 pull-out drawers. 630A vertical bus, 50 kA rated short-time withstand. Arc-resistant per IEC TR 61641. Each drawer configurable with contactor, overload, and fusible disconnect.
benefits: Enhanced operator safety with arc-resistant design
Quick drawer replacement reduces downtime
Flexible module configuration for changing loads
seoTitle: ABB MNS 800 Motor Control Center | 16 Drawer Section
seoDescription: ABB MNS 800 motor control center section with 16 pull-out drawers, 630A bus, arc-resistant. For centralized motor control in industrial plants.

faq.question: What size can be accommodated in the drawers?
faq.answer: Drawers can accommodate starters from 0.25 kW up to 200 kW with appropriate components.

faq.question: What communication protocols are supported?
faq.answer: Profinet, EtherNet/IP, Modbus TCP, and Profibus DP are supported for remote monitoring.

faq.question: What is the arc-resistant classification?
faq.answer: Arc tested per IEC TR 61641 at 50 kA for 100 ms, accessible front and rear.

name: Siemens 3LD2 Switch Disconnector 250A
description: The Siemens 3LD2 switch disconnector is a 250A load-break switch for safe isolation of electrical circuits. With visible contact gap and padlockable handle, it provides safe isolation for maintenance and emergency switching.
shortDescription: Switch disconnector 250A, 3-pole, rotary handle, padlockable, IP65.
technicalDescription: 3-pole load-break switch disconnector with 250A rating, rotary handle, and padlockable OFF position. Visible contact gap for safe isolation. IP65 enclosure for outdoor and harsh environments.
features: Visible contact gap for safe isolation
Rotary handle with padlockable OFF position
Auxiliary contact options for status feedback
benefits: Safe isolation for maintenance personnel
Padlockable handle enables lockout/tagout procedures
Rugged design for industrial environments
seoDescription: Siemens 3LD2500 switch disconnector, 250A, 3-pole, rotary handle, IP65, padlockable. For safe electrical isolation and lockout/tagout.

faq.question: What is the difference between a switch disconnector and a circuit breaker?
faq.answer: A switch disconnector provides load switching and isolation but has no overcurrent protection. A circuit breaker provides both switching and protection.

faq.question: Can this be used as a main switch?
faq.answer: Yes, it is suitable for use as a main disconnect switch for machinery per IEC 60204-1.

faq.question: What handle color combinations are available?
faq.answer: Red handle with yellow marking (standard for disconnect) or gray handle (for non-safety applications).
